name: AirTrail
description: A modern, open-source personal flight tracking system
compose:
name: slashnode-airtrail
services:
  app:
    image: johly/airtrail:v3.10.0
    container_name: airtrail-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      UPLOAD_LOCATION: /app/uploads
      DB_URL: postgres://airtrail:itworkslocally@airtrail-postgres:5432/airtrail
    volumes:
      - app_data-uploads:/app/uploads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3256:3000
  postgres:
    image: postgres:18.3-alpine
    container_name: airtrail-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: airtrail
      POSTGRES_USER: airtrail
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: itworkslocally
      PGDATA: /data/pgdata
    volumes:
      - postgres_data-db:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-uploads:
    name: slashnode-airtrail_app_data-uploads
  postgres_data-db:
    name: slashnode-airtrail_postgres_data-db
